pcr: PCR 2019:14 Construction Products v1.3.4; c-PCR-003 Concrete, concrete elements (EN 16757:2023)
lca_tool: GCCA's Industry EPD Tool for Cement and Concrete v5.0 (International version)
scope: A1-A3 + A4-A5 + B1-B7 + C1-C4 + D, cradle-to-grave

compressive_strength.standard: Not stated in source (product labelled 'Normal-Class 25 MPa'; no AS 1379 or explicit grade-code citation given — only AS 3600:2018 is cited, and only for the 50-year reference service life assumption)

notes: Filename encodes an internal mix/grade code 'GE252WA06-3' (per source-pdfs filename) that does NOT appear anywhere in the EPD document text; in-document the product is identified only as 'HyLo-50 Normal-Class 25 MPa' (registration EPD-IES-0014958:001, density 2315 kg/m3). raw_class recorded as printed in the 'Compressive strength' field ('25'); no formal grade code (e.g. 'N25') is given in the source.
Product stage reported combined only (A1-A3 = 141); the module-declaration table (p11) marks A1, A2 and A3 all 'X' (declared) but no numeric split is ever published → A1/A2/A3 = 'incl'.

B1 (Use stage) = -3.28 kg CO2e is a real declared value, not a zero/ND placeholder: it is the GCCA-tool default recarbonation credit for Stage B stated explicitly in the assumptions (p9: '-3.28 kg CO2 eq./m3 at Stage B'). B2-B7 are genuine declared zeros (use-stage impacts other than recarbonation assumed nil).

This is a Generic EPD for the Gold Coast region covering ONE product/registration (EPD-IES-0014958:001, this file). Pages 21-24 additionally print a large benchmarking table of ~50 SIBLING Hymix product lines (e.g. EPD-IES-0014955 through EPD-IES-0015011), each under its own separate EPD registration and each with only summary A1-A3/full-lifecycle GWP-tot figures (no module breakdown, no density, no verification info specific to this document). These are not sub-products of this EPD and are not modelled here; only the row matching EPD-IES-0014958:001 (A1-A3=141, Full lifecycle=167, Application='General') corresponds to this file's product. Treated as a single-product EPD.
No EN 15804+A1/CML alternate-methodology table is present in this document (unlike some EPD International SimaPro-based EPDs) → gwp_a1a3_alt omitted.
Total energy use omitted from summary_extras — source reports PERT (26.6 MJ, A1-A3) and PENRT (469 MJ, A1-A3) separately (p19); no single combined kWh figure is given.

Unlike other worked examples in this corpus, this document has no cover-page offset: PDF page index N corresponds exactly to printed page number N throughout (verified against printed page numbers on pp.1, 9, 18, 26).
